sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113902" key="xhnoboskiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χηνο-βοσκικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n113902.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of a gooseherd,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κλῆρος</foreign> Pap. in <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Atti del IV Congresso Internazionale di Papirologia</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:p.70" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.70</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Ptolemaic</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
